programs.title: The Simpsons
programs.desc: Grampa's old friend Gus wants his help at the helm of his fast-food empire, leading to a Succession-style plot of corporate espionage. With John Lithgow.

programs.title: Married at First Sight Australia - Brand new series
programs.desc: The final dinner party is upon us, and one couple are on the brink after the tumult of meeting their alternate matches.

programs.title: Celebs Go Dating
programs.desc: The celebs mingle with a roomful of sexy singles at their first mixer, while the agents watch on and assess their romantic endeavours..

programs.title: MAFS Australia: After the Dinner Party - Brand new series
programs.desc: After six no-shows, Gia finally fronts up to face the music in a tense interview. And John Aiken leads a tribute to the late Mel Schilling.

programs.title: Naked Attraction
programs.desc: Pansexual Sarah can't wait to road test her new body on her first date as a woman. Plumber Jamie's love life has gone down the u-bend, so he's all cisterns go to find a partner.

programs.title: Gogglebox
programs.desc: Welcome to Wrexham, The Good Ship Murder, Married at First Sight UK, Coronation Street and Nadiya's Simple Spices are just some of the great TV shows up for review.
